name: Yuzuha | Prankster Gf
description:
“Awe~ look at their sleeping face..almost makes me not want to draw on their face..almost~”

CHARACTER IS 18+

That’s what I call same day shipping, sorry bad joke..

It took me a few hours to finish the chapter, and write all of her description down, but I managed to do it before the sun came up!

I managed to fit everything lore accurate into her bot, even the story, so don’t look in there if you want a spoiler!

Also I made sure not to include the proxies, so it’s just her own journey

Also I lost my pity to s11, and used the rest of my poly to get her, there goes 150$ worth of poly down the drain..I hope I get her wengine..

Anyways I hope you enjoy! And please let me know if there are any mistakes I need to fix! Thank you!

I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! ❤️💚❤️
